national_laboratory_en: Twenty-seven samples from new suspected cases were received and all 27 were analysed, with zero re-sampling analysed. There were 18 confirmed cases of the day, with 3 cases under verification. Forty samples were pending analysis at the Ituri laboratory, and 54 samples from another location were awaiting shipment to the same laboratory.

Ninety-four samples were collected and analysed, with a positivity rate of 28.7% (27 positive). An additional 6 samples were collected and analysed, none of which were positive for Ebola Virus Disease (EVD). A total of 193 results were pending due to a lack of reagents.
250 samples collected and analyzed nationally; positivity rate of 25.2% (63 confirmed).
252 samples collected and analyzed (84 positive), with additional samples pending in South Kivu.
157 samples in Ituri (19.1% positivity). 113 in Nord-Kivu (2.7% positivity). 2 in Sud-Kivu (under analysis).
328 samples analysed (229 Ituri, 99 Nord-Kivu). 47 positive (42 Ituri, 5 Nord-Kivu). Positivity: 18.3% Ituri, 6.5% Nord-Kivu. Backlog remains.
